name: Oysters and Artichoke Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook artichoke hearts as directed on package.
2. Place the cooked artichokes in a flat, buttered casserole dish.
3. Cover with sautéed mushrooms.
4. Cook oysters in their liquid until edges begin to curl. Drain thoroughly using a colander and set aside the cooking liquid.
5. Melt butter and sauté onion until tender; add parsley and cook for an additional minute.
6. Add flour, stirring until smooth.
7. Gradually add enough white wine to the oyster liquid to make 1 1/2 cups. Stir in thyme, salt, pepper, and paprika or cayenne pepper.
8. Stir constantly until the mixture thickens.
9. Add cooked oysters and spoon the mixture over artichokes and mushrooms.
10. Arrange thinly sliced lemon on top of the dish.
11. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 10 minutes, or until bubbling.
